artifact_summary: City of Tampa DMI 20 Form for scheduling utilized subcontractors, consultants, and suppliers with NIGP codes and financial data.
artifact_key_elements: Subcontractor Listing Table with NIGP Codes
artifact_blurb: This is a City of Tampa DMI 20 Form, specifically a 'Schedule of All To-Be-Utilized Sub-(Contractors/Consultants/Suppliers)'. The document facilitates the official registration of third-party entities involved in municipal projects. It includes dedicated fields for primary contract and company details, a structured table for enumerating subcontractors alongside their specific NIGP classification codes and associated financial metrics, and a formal certification section requiring authorized signatures to validate the submitted information.
